segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Hey, you must be the new guest.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, I'm Jongkuk. Nice to meet you.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: I'm Alex. Did you just get in?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, I just arrived from Korea today. My brain's not fully online yet.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Totally fair. Don't worry about anything tonight.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. I just wanted to say hi and ask one quick thing.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Is there a shelf in the fridge I should use? I don't want to take anyone's space by accident.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Use the lower shelf for now. We usually label our food and clean up after cooking.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That makes sense. I'll keep it simple tonight and get settled tomorrow.
